ch0360_00_kakitsubata/0101_0701_02_10:
Keep up the good work! Give it your best
on my behalf, too!
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7101_0701_01_10: Chill and have fun. That’s my motto.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7101_0701_02_10: Just relax and go with the flow, OK, bud?
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7102_0701_01_10: Standing around like this is tiring work...
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7102_0701_02_10:
Can’t I just go sit and have a nice,
relaxing meal?
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7102_0701_03_10: It’d be even better if there were sweets.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7103_0701_01_10:
Life has a way of working itself out. Take it
from me, the guy Blueberry Academy held
back, like, three times!
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7103_0701_02_10:
Sometimes in life, you just gotta take a stroll
on the scenic path.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7103_0701_03_10: No need to rush or panic. Just take it easy.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7104_0701_01_10:
Making an effort can be a drag, but when it
comes to battling, I’m not just gonna roll
over and miss out on the fun.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7104_0701_02_10:
So watch out, ’cause that’s when I give
my all.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7104_0701_03_10:
Here’s the 100-percent Drayster truth: I’m so
psyched about all the sync pairs I can battle
on this island, I’m practically tingling.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7105_0701_01_10:
You’ve really got a knack for melting away
the tension, [Name:PlayerNickname ].
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7105_0701_02_10:
It makes things fun for me. The Drayster’s
grateful you’re around!
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/7105_0701_03_10: I’m countin’ on your people skills, buddy!
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/1701_0701_01_10:
I’ve got something for you, bud. A little
token of my everlasting gratitude.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/1701_0702_01_10: Think it’ll be useful? Glad to hear it.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2501_0701_01_10:
Hey, bud, answer me this! If I get held back
another year at Blueberry Academy, it’s not
that big a deal, right?
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2501_0701_02_10: I’m doing my best here on Pasio, after all!
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2501_0701_03_10:
Of course, I wouldn’t have enough credits!
Oh, what a shame!
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2501_0702_01_10:
Er... I’d appreciate it if you didn’t tell my
teachers and other League Club members
what I said earlier, OK?
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2501_0702_02_10:
If they find out I’ve been slacking off,
I’ll never hear the end it! Heh heh!
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2511_0701_01_10: You’re always shining so bright, buddy.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2511_0701_02_10:
Some folks might see that talent of yours
and feel bad they don’t shine as bright.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2511_0701_03_10:
If that person’s a friend, you gotta snap ’em
out of it.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2511_0702_02_10:
You’re someone who treasures both yourself
and others.
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/2511_0702_03_10:
So if someone’s having a hard time,
you know what to do...right, buddy?
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/3001_0701_01_10:
I consider myself lucky when my first class of
the day is a lecture. Gives me more time to
catch some Z’s!
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/3003_0701_01_10:
Ugh, I’m too lazy to eat a proper lunch
today... Why don’t we just grab something
soft and avoid all that chewing?
ch0360_00_kakitsubata/3005_0701_01_10:
I napped too much and can’t sleep a wink...
Hey, how about a lazy late-night hang?
